name_en: 🆕 In stock 24k Teddy Lamb Fur - Full cuteness, fluffy and soft, definitely a Mocha color scheme. This bag is amazing! Lots of highlights and details. Whether paired with casual daily wear or formal evening wear, it handles it perfectly. Size: 25*17*6*cm
